Get Started

FOR MERCHANTS

Turn Coupon Liabilities into High-Performing Digital Assets

Join merchants using the Mezzofy Exchange Protocol to maximize reach, control, and revenue

List Your Inventory View Product Bundles
FOR MERCHANTS

How Does Mezzofy Help Merchants
Succeed with Digital Coupons?

Mezzofy is a digital coupon exchange platform that helps merchants create, distribute, and monetize digital coupons across 15+ Asia-Pacific markets. Using the Mezzofy Exchange Protocol, merchants eliminate coupon liabilities, reach new customers through NFC, marketplace, and digital channels, and generate revenue on every successful redemption — with zero upfront fees.

How merchants leverage the Mezzofy Exchange Protocol across the coupon lifecycle

1
Step 1

CREATE

Use Management System to build campaigns with first-party data control

Templates Targeting Tokenized
2
Step 2

DISTRIBUTE

Deploy via NFC, Marketing, Marketplace

Email SMS Chat API
3
Step 3

OPTIMIZE

Track with Playbook strategies, analyze with Wallet insights

A/B Test Analytics Real-time

Why Do Merchants Choose Mezzofy?

Zero Upfront Cost

Pay only when coupons are redeemed. No setup fees or monthly minimums.

Flexible Control

Real-time modification of campaigns. Full first-party data ownership.

Global Footprint

Access to 15+ markets across Asia-Pacific and growing distribution networks.

Future-Proof Asset

AI-native infrastructure ready for autonomous shopping agents.

Ready to Transform Your Coupon Strategy?

Join leading merchants who trust Mezzofy to power their digital coupon infrastructure
